win_condition: The player holding the superhero medal wins when the building collapses (unless they caused it). If no collapse, the medal holder wins when floor cards run out.
message: Rhino Hero: Super Battle has no point system. The game ends when the skyscraper collapses or all floor cards are used. The player holding the superhero medal wins -- unless the medal holder is the one who caused the collapse, in which case all other players win together. If no one holds the medal at game end, everyone loses.
